---
name: Feature Request
description: Suggest a feature
labels: [enhancement]
---

## Tier

Select the tier this feature applies to:

- [ ] Command (user-facing workflow)
- [ ] Skill (reusable building block)
- [ ] Agent (background monitoring)
- [ ] Rule (coding convention)
- [ ] Config (new config option)

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you are requesting.

## Use Case

Describe the problem or workflow this feature would address.

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of how you envision this feature working.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you have considered.
